same_workload.query: SELECT tenant_id, bucket, SUM(amount), COUNT(*) WHERE tenant_id = 7 GROUP BY tenant_id, bucket ORDER BY tenant_id, bucket

claim_policy: No Firebolt aggregate-index benchmark claim may be made unless both UltraSQL and local Firebolt Core are measured on the same rows, query, warmup, and iters.
policy: No Firebolt aggregate-index benchmark claim exists unless Firebolt has a measured local Core artifact and EXPLAIN shows Aggregating Index usage. Missing local Core is recorded as not_available, not as a result.
